name: Man Selling Honey
content: There was a man selling honey and various other goods out of his truck across the street from the Alon gas station. I do not know his name nor anything else about him. I bought a jar of honey and some flavored peanuts from him. The honey was unlike any honey which I have had in the city, with strong floral notes and a consistency that remains runny even at lower temperatures. The peanuts were also good. Both the honey and the peanuts were well worth my money.
